description:
The model string "gpt-5.3-codex" is hardcoded in 9 non-routing locations:
- cli_types/vision_types.rs (2x, clap default_value)
- cli_types/requirements_types.rs (2x, clap default_value)
- ops_planning/types.rs (3x, Default impls)
- shared.rs (1x, Default impl)
- review_impl.rs (1x, unwrap_or fallback)

These should all reference `protocol::default_model_for_tool("codex")` or a shared const. Changing the default model currently requires editing 9+ files.
title: Replace hardcoded `"gpt-5.3-codex"` literals with `default_model_for_tool()` calls
